title: Aether — a language in your browser
description: A from-scratch ML-family programming language with Hindley–Milner inference, TYPE CLASSES (dictionary-passing), and TWO backends — a bytecode stack VM and a JavaScript code generator that matches the VM byte-for-byte. Now with PROPERTY-BASED TESTING that generates random inputs from inferred types and shrinks failures, plus monadic do-notation, list comprehensions, an interactive HM derivation tree, a time-travel debugger, and turtle graphics.
